featureDetection.rationale: Checks natively for the LanguageDetector global, showing support badge status and adapting fallbacks accordingly.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Integrates a fully working local word-based token matching heuristic to simulate confidence scores when the native API is missing.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Allows live typing, presets selection, and a dynamic range slider that updates confidence thresholds and re-evaluates matches in real time.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Excellent deep dive on the specific confidence ranking and thresholding design pattern.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Faithfully adopts design system rules with high contrast styling for active/filtered results.
